name: Task Force 141 (Moth user)
description:
Moth user joins Task Force 141 but upon meeting their moth instincts kick in and they can’t stop staring at the light in the room.

This was a requested bot so Please let me know if you want anything changed as i’m aware it’s not very long.

Request form is on my profile.

Feedback, tips, suggestions and support are more than welcome in the comments but please be respectful.

I thought the picture was cute so i chose it. Found it on Pinterest user is Jeff Dreg

I’ve recently moved house so been very slow with everything thank you for your patience!
